description_long: This chest of drawers features a simple, utilitarian design with a rectangular wooden body and a single, prominent drawer at the front. The main structure is a dark brown, flat-topped form with a slightly lighter brown drawer that stands out against the body. The drawer is boxy and lacks visible handles or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The surface appears smooth and unadorned, with no visible carvings, inlays, or embellishments. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood, likely with a hollow interior for storage. Its compact size and straightforward design make it suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or utility rooms.
description: A minimalist, dark brown wooden chest of drawers with a single, handle-less drawer and a smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_0: The chest is seen from an angle showing the top and a side, with the drawer barely visible.
description_view_1: The front view clearly displays the single, rectangular drawer set into the body of the chest.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors view 0, with the drawer again only slightly visible.
description_view_3: The back view shows a plain, uninterrupted surface with no visible drawer or features.
